title: Manually Trigger A Tote Exchange By Tote ID Or Lane Number
summary: Use the documented tote management functions shown on the Aveva API page to manually trigger a tote exchange either by tote ID using "Exchange Tote" or by lane number using "Exchange Lane." The source supports identification of the two functions and their stated purpose, but does not provide parameter format, execution confirmation, or post-exchange validation details.
when_to_use: Use when authorized support personnel need to initiate a manual tote exchange and have either the tote ID or the lane number available, based on the documented Aveva API tote management functions shown in the source.
not_for: Do not use when the required tote ID or lane number is not available.
Do not use when the Exchange Tote or Exchange Lane functions are not accessible.
Do not use to infer parameter formats, confirmation behavior, or post-exchange validation steps, because those details are not provided in the source.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Identify the correct tote exchange function on the Aveva API page, choose the function matching the available identifier, and initiate the manual tote exchange only when authorized access is available.

safety_notes: This is a manual state-changing API action.
The source does not provide execution guardrails or safe execution details.
Do not invent parameter formats, confirmation behavior, or post-exchange validation steps not shown in the source.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the Aveva API page showing tote management functions
Authorized ability to use Exchange Tote or Exchange Lane
Tote ID or lane number, depending on the selected function

access_required: Access to the Aveva API page showing tote management functions
Authorized ability to use Exchange Tote or Exchange Lane
system_preconditions: The support user has either a tote ID or a lane number available for the exchange request.
The Aveva API page displays the tote management functions including Exchange Tote and Exchange Lane.

visual_references.description: Training video frame showing the Aveva API page with API Features for Tote Management, including Exchange Tote, Exchange Lane, and Get Exchange Settings.

steps.title: Open or view the tote management API page
steps.purpose: Access the documented interface that contains the manual tote exchange functions.
steps.instruction: Open or view the Aveva API page that lists tote management functions and confirm the tote management options are visible.
steps.expected_result: The Aveva API page is visible and includes tote management functions.
steps.healthy_condition: The page shows tote management entries including Exchange Tote and Exchange Lane.
steps.failure_condition: The page is not accessible or the tote management functions are not visible.

actions.label: View tote management API page
actions.exact_action: Open or view the Aveva API page that lists tote management functions.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: API Features for Tote Management page showing Exchange Tote, Exchange Lane, and related tote functions.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the exchange functions are not accessible.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: "Exchange Tote" manually triggers a tote exchange by tote ID, "Exchange Lane" by lane number, and "Get Exchange Settings" retrieves tote exchange settings and configurations.
Frame shows an Aveva API page with API Features for Tote Management. OCR-visible items include Exchange Tote, Exchange Lane, and Get Exchange Settings.

steps.title: Verify the Exchange Tote function
steps.purpose: Confirm the tote-ID-based exchange function and its documented purpose before use.
steps.instruction: Locate the function named "Exchange Tote" and verify that the displayed description says it manually triggers a tote exchange by tote ID.
steps.expected_result: The Exchange Tote function is identified as the tote-ID-based manual exchange option.
steps.healthy_condition: The displayed description matches manual tote exchange by tote ID.
steps.failure_condition: The Exchange Tote function is missing or its displayed purpose cannot be verified from the page.

steps.title: Choose the exchange function that matches the available identifier
steps.purpose: Ensure the manual exchange is initiated using the documented function that corresponds to the identifier available to the support user.
steps.instruction: Choose the documented exchange function that matches the identifier available to the support user, either tote ID or lane number.
steps.expected_result: The correct documented function is selected based on whether the available identifier is a tote ID or a lane number.
steps.healthy_condition: Exchange Tote is selected when a tote ID is available, or Exchange Lane is selected when a lane number is available.
steps.failure_condition: The required identifier is not available or the selected function does not match the available identifier.

The Exchange Tote or Exchange Lane functions are not accessible.
